'''lazhada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachumber|kachumber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachumber|kachumber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lazhada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhædæth|læzhædæth]] || [[word:læzhædæj|læzhædæj]] || [[word:læzhædæsh|læzhædæsh]] || [[word:læzhædæ|læzhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhazhadath|lazhazhadath]] || [[word:lazhazhadaj|lazhazhadaj]] || [[word:lazhazhadash|lazhazhadash]] || [[word:lazhazhada|lazhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhadath|lazhadath]] || [[word:lazhadaj|lazhadaj]] || [[word:lazhadash|lazhadash]] || [[word:lazhada|lazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhafdafth|lazhafdafth]] || [[word:lazhafdafj|lazhafdafj]] || [[word:lazhafdafsh|lazhafdafsh]] || [[word:lazhafdaf|lazhafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhadatha|lazhadatha]] || [[word:lazhadaja|lazhadaja]] || [[word:lazhadasha|lazhadasha]] || [[word:lazhadaka|lazhadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhadath|lazhadath]] || [[word:lazhadaj|lazhadaj]] || [[word:lazhadash|lazhadash]] || [[word:lazhada|lazhada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhadathal|lazhadathal]] || [[word:lazhadajal|lazhadajal]] || [[word:lazhadashal|lazhadashal]] || [[word:lazhadakal|lazhadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhadaathatha|lazhadaathatha]] || [[word:lazhadaajaja|lazhadaajaja]] || [[word:lazhadaashasha|lazhadaashasha]] || [[word:lazhadaaka|lazhadaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhadathan|lazhadathan]] || [[word:lazhadajan|lazhadajan]] || [[word:lazhadashan|lazhadashan]] || [[word:lazhadakan|lazhadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhadathaoro|lazhadathaoro]] || [[word:lazhadajaoro|lazhadajaoro]] || [[word:lazhadashaoro|lazhadashaoro]] || [[word:lazhadakaoro|lazhadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
